mapper.select: SELECT id, name, contact, side, attendance, adult_count, child_count, meal_option, privacy_consent, created_at, updated_at FROM rsvp WHERE contact = #{contact}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rsvp (name, contact, side, attendance, adult_count, child_count, meal_option, privacy_consent, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{contact}, #{side}, #{attendance}, #{adultCount}, #{childCount}, #{mealOption}, #{privacyConsent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE rsvp SET name = #{name}, side = #{side}, attendance = #{attendance}, adult_count = #{adultCount}, child_count = #{childCount}, meal_option = #{mealOption}, privacy_consent = #{privacyConsent}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE contact = #{contact}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, contact, side, attendance, adult_count, child_count, meal_option, privacy_consent, created_at, updated_at FROM rsvp ORDER BY created_at DESC
